title: Big Globe - Remove Abandoned City
description: Remove Abandoned City in Big Globe
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-remove-abandoned-city)

This mod/datapack removes the Abandoned Cities of [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe), which makes it no longer generated in the world (Overworld).

### **Example Before Screenshot:**
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/261d715f339a1ce8c1734d43c6ad7973e5031187_0.webp)

### **Example After Screenshot:**
![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40539b3b5377fc35f8f42d6af198ce6ea6f34643_0.webp)
